advanced.name: test_namenode_block_report_api
advanced.description: The NameNode exposes an API endpoint to receive block reports from DataNodes.

advanced.name: test_namenode_blocks_to_remove
advanced.description: The NameNode responds to block reports with a list of blocks that should be removed.

advanced.name: test_datanode_removes_blocks
advanced.description: A DataNode removes all blocks that have been indicated for deletion by the NameNode.

advanced.name: test_namenode_tracks_blocks_per_datanode
advanced.description: The NameNode keeps track of which blocks are stored in each DataNode.

advanced.name: test_underreplicated_blocks_added_to_queue
advanced.description: Underreplicated blocks are added to the replication queue by the NameNode.

advanced.name: test_namenode_instructs_replication_of_underreplicated_blocks
advanced.description: The NameNode instructs DataNodes to replicate underreplicated blocks they own to other DataNodes in the next block report response.

advanced.name: test_namenode_tracks_last_block_report
advanced.description: Check that the NameNode keeps track of the last time each DataNode sent a block report.

advanced.name: test_missing_blocks_added_to_replication_queue
advanced.description: Check that the NameNode adds missing blocks from a down DataNode to the replication queue.

difficult.name: test_journal
difficult.description: The journal must track namespace operations.

difficult.name: test_write_pipeline
difficult.description: DataNode must support write pipelines and forward blocks to the next DataNode.

nice_to_have.name: test_delete_file_204
nice_to_have.description: DELETE /files/{filename} should return 204 for existing file.

nice_to_have.name: test_delete_file_404
nice_to_have.description: DELETE /files/{filename} should return 404 after the file was already deleted.

nice_to_have.name: test_client_upload_file_replicas
nice_to_have.description: All datanodes have replicas of the blocks

nice_to_have.name: test_client_upload_download_failover
nice_to_have.description: Client upload/download failover is implemented correctly.

essential.name: test_datanodes_content
essential.description: /datanodes must return the exact list of datanodes from settings.json.

essential.name: test_create_file_200
essential.description: POST /files must return 200 OK when creating a new file.

essential.name: test_create_file_duplicate
essential.description: Creating a file twice must return 409.

essential.name: test_get_file_status
essential.description: GET /files/{filename} must return 200 for an existing file.

essential.name: test_get_file_not_found
essential.description: GET /files/{filename} for an unknown file must return 404.

essential.name: test_add_block_200
essential.description: POST /files/{filename}/blocks should return 200 for valid file.

essential.name: test_add_block_structure
essential.description: After adding first block, it must appear in the file's block list.

essential.name: test_add_block_missing_file
essential.description: Adding a block to a non-existent file must return 404.

essential.name: test_round_robin
essential.description: Round-robin placement must rotate replicas across datanodes in order 1 → 2 → 3 → 1 → ...

essential.name: test_datanode1_healthcheck
essential.description: /healthcheck must return 200 OK and {"status": "up"} for DataNode 1.

essential.name: test_datanode2_healthcheck
essential.description: /healthcheck must return 200 OK and {"status": "up"} for DataNode 2.

essential.name: test_datanode3_healthcheck
essential.description: /healthcheck must return 200 OK and {"status": "up"} for DataNode 3.

essential.name: test_write_block_datanode1
essential.description: PUT /files/{filename}/blocks/{block_number} must store the block on disk.

essential.name: test_read_block_datanode1
essential.description: GET /files/{filename}/blocks/{block_number} must return the correct block content.

essential.name: test_read_block_not_found
essential.description: GET /files/{filename}/blocks/{block_number} must return 404 if block does not exist.
